generated_oml:
import DTDFVocab
instance PMMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor with input current I_M and output torque τ_M"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearwheel component"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox component"
]

instance SiemensController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for motion execution"
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder for position measurement",
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderPositionData
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder for position measurement (post-gearbox)",
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderPositionData
]

instance CurrentSensors : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensors measuring input current I_M",
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentSensorsCurrentData
]

instance MotorEncoderPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder,
    base:desc "Position data from motor encoder streamed via MQTT"
]

instance SecondaryEncoderPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder,
    base:desc "Position data from secondary encoder (post-gearbox) streamed via MQTT"
]

instance CurrentSensorsCurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensors,
    base:desc "Current measurement data (I_M) streamed via MQTT"
]

instance RobotFirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "First axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot used for machining applications with working range [-90°, 90°] and max speed 75°/s",
    base:contains PMMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox, SiemensController
]

instance RobotFirstAxis : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "First axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot",
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment RobotFirstAxisEnvironment
]

instance FrictionParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Derivation of static, kinetic, and viscous friction parameters for robot control"
]

instance MotionAccuracyVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of motion accuracy for improvement"
]

instance UpdateControlAlgorithmAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Update robot control algorithms using friction parameters to improve motion accuracy",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FrictionModelIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time friction model identification using white-box and black-box methods",
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterInsight, UpdateControlAlgorithmAction
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated dashboard visualization for motion accuracy improvement",
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyVisualizationInsight
]

instance JointFrictionAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware joint friction analysis",
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterInsight, MotionAccuracyVisualizationInsight
]

instance SysMLModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService, DashboardVisualizationService, JointFrictionAnalysisService
]

instance SimulinkSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink for friction simulation",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService, JointFrictionAnalysisService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells for asset context",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService, DashboardVisualizationService, JointFrictionAnalysisService
]

instance MQTTDataStreamingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService, DashboardVisualizationService, JointFrictionAnalysisService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard for visualization of motion accuracy",
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance MeasuredCurrent : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured input current I_M",
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorsCurrentData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTDataStreamingEnabler, SimulinkSimulationEnabler, AASEnabler, DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance MeasuredMotorPosition : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor position (r_M)",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTDataStreamingEnabler, SimulinkSimulationEnabler, AASEnabler, DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance MeasuredGearPosition : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured gearbox input position (r_G)",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTDataStreamingEnabler, SimulinkSimulationEnabler, AASEnabler, DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance MeasuredOutputPosition : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured output position (r_out)",
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderPositionData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTDataStreamingEnabler, SimulinkSimulationEnabler, AASEnabler, DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance SimulatedCurrent : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated input current I_M",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler, AASEnabler, DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance SimulatedMotorPosition : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor position (r_M)",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler, AASEnabler, DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance SimulatedGearPosition : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated gearbox input position (r_G)",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler, AASEnabler, DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance SimulatedOutputPosition : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated output position (r_out)",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler, AASEnabler, DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance SysMLBDDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural modeling",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler
]

instance SysMLIBDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural modeling",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model in Simulink",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance StribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model in Simulink",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance DahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model in Simulink",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance LuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model in Simulink",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance AASModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for asset context",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data processing for continuous friction model identification during robot operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Digital shadow reference model with data traces linked to engineering models via Processing components; AAS for asset description; simulation models for data computation."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase ('as operated'), continuously collecting live data during robot operation for friction analysis."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through deviation analysis between simulated data and measured reference values to identify friction loss; multi-physics-aware model identification."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming from physical sensors to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standards and SysML for systems engineering modeling."
]
